data.title: AdCellerant introduces AI Media Planner tool on Ui.Marketing platform to streamline digital media planning.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Denver, a prominent digital advertising tech firm, AdCellerant, unveiled AI Media Planner on its Ui.Marketing platform. The tool aims to streamline a labor-intensive aspect of digital advertising. This launch is seen as a significant step forward for the company in revolutionizing digital advertising strategies.

data.title: Wonderskin launches new cleansing balm to melt makeup in seconds, promises to protect skin barrier. New York, Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Introducing Wonderskin's first-ever beauty balm designed to defend your skin barrier and effortlessly dissolve stubborn makeup within moments. The innovative product debuted in New York on January 28, 2026, marking a significant step in skincare. This launch signifies the brand's commitment to providing effective cleansing solutions in line with its reputation for durable and viral makeup products.

data.title: Wall Street leaders from top firms discussed DeFi worries with SEC. Citadel, SIFMA, and JPMorgan met to address crypto agenda concerns.
data.description: On Tuesday, Citadel, SIFMA, and JPMorgan held discussions with the SEC to express concerns about the regulatory agency's strong focus on cryptocurrency. Key players in the finance sector emphasized worries about the SEC's proactive approach towards crypto-related matters.

data.title: Guardian wins DALBAR Annuity Service Award for 9th year in a row, praised for customer service excellence.
data.description: In Marlborough, Massachusetts on January 28, 2026, The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America® (Guardian) received the DALBAR Annuity Service Award for the ninth year in a row. DALBAR, a prominent auditor of customer service experiences, presented the award to Guardian. The company's consistent excellence in customer service has been acknowledged through this prestigious award, highlighting their dedication to providing exemplary service to their policyholders.

data.title: Global market for Modular Refineries valued at $2.4 Billion in 2024, projected to reach $3.1 Billion by 2030, growing at 4.4% CAGR. Regional focus drives investment in small-scale crude oil production sites.
data.description: In Dublin, the Global Strategic Business Report on the Modular Refineries Market has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights that the Modular Refineries Market was valued at US$2.4 Billion in 2024, with a projected growth to US$3.1 Billion by 2030. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.4% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, drivers, and forecasts to assist in making informed business decisions. The resurgence of modular refineries is a key aspect covered in the report.

data.title: PuroClean named a top franchise for 2026 by Franchise Business Review, showing high satisfaction levels.
data.description: A recent independent franchise survey conducted in Tamarac, Florida, on Jan. 28, 2026, revealed high levels of satisfaction among franchisees with PuroClean, a prominent franchise brand specializing in property restoration and remediation services. The survey recognized PuroClean as a top franchise in 2026 due to positive feedback on support, leadership, and overall performance. This acknowledgment highlights the strong reputation and success of PuroClean within the industry, reflecting the satisfaction of franchisees with the company's services.

data.title: UFC partners with Good Greek Moving & Storage as official movers in multiyear deal.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, Good Greek Moving & Storage has been designated as the first official movers of UFC. This significant partnership, revealed on January 28, 2026, involves a multiyear marketing agreement between UFC and Good Greek Moving & Storage. This collaboration demonstrates the increasing convergence between sports entities and service providers, highlighting the strategic efforts to promote both brands. The exact duration and financial details of the partnership were not disclosed, but this move is expected to significantly boost the visibility of both organizations.

data.title: Guidehouse introduces new AI solution with Databricks, enhancing financial operations for government agencies.
data.description: A revolutionary AI and data platform is revolutionizing financial operations, enhancing audit efficiency and accuracy for government agencies. Guidehouse, a leading global professional services firm specializing in AI technology, is at the forefront of this transformation. This next-generation platform promises to significantly expedite audits and bolster resilience across various government agencies. The development marks a significant leap forward in leveraging technology to streamline financial processes. The platform is slated to bring about a major breakthrough in audit capabilities, positioning government bodies to operate with unparalleled efficiency. This groundbreaking innovation is set to reshape financial operations by enabling quicker, more precise audits within the public sector. The introduction of this cutting-edge platform represents a pivotal moment in advancing financial governance, with potential benefits extending across different government agencies.

data.title: Global medium voltage cable and accessory market to hit USD 98.6 billion by 2036 amid power grid transformation.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware on January 28, 2026, there has been a significant development in global energy systems. The shift towards decentralization and decarbonization is causing a surge in value for the foundational infrastructure facilitating these changes. Recent data indicates a substantial increase in value for these infrastructures as the industry undergoes a transformation.
